title: Top row: Q W E R T
description: Move up to top row — left hand reaches
text: we we we re re re ter ter ter wet wet wet sew sew sew red red red were were tree tree
finger_focus: Left top row + home row mix

tips.text: Q-W-E-R-T are stretches UP from home row
Reach with the SAME finger that owns each column

tips.target: we we we re re re ter ter ter wet wet
tips.hint: Left top row + home row mix

tips.text: Return to home row after each top-row keystroke

tips.target: wet sew sew sew red red red were were tree tree
tips.hint: Left top row + home row mix

character_tips.anna: Stretch UP to top row, then immediately return to home row.
character_tips.maxim: QWERT is left hand's reach. Every typist learns this stretch.
character_tips.knopych: TOP ROW UNLOCKED! ⬆️ Reach high, return home!
